author_rating_explanation: Both authors are affiliated with the Center for Cyber Security at New York University Abu Dhabi. While NYU is a top US university, the Abu Dhabi campus is a distinct international branch and does not automatically qualify for the top US school band (8-10). It is a concrete research center at a recognized global university campus, placing it in the mid-tier band.

author_profiles.name: Rupesh Raj Karn
author_profiles.affiliation: Center for Cyber Security, New York University, Abu Dhabi, UAE.

author_profiles.name: Ozgur Sinanoglu
author_profiles.affiliation: Center for Cyber Security, New York University, Abu Dhabi, UAE.
